criteria.label: Implement an off-by-one-free iterative binary search using half-open intervals.
criteria.example:
```python
lo, hi = 0, len(xs)
while lo < hi:
    mid = lo + (hi - lo) // 2
    if xs[mid] < t: lo = mid + 1
    else:           hi = mid
```

criteria.label: Pick binary search vs hash table vs linear scan based on access pattern.
criteria.example: Many unordered lookups → set. Many ordered/range lookups → sort + bisect. One-off → linear.

criteria.label: Generalize binary search to a monotonic predicate over an answer space.
Recognize and prove monotonicity of the predicate before binary-searching it.
criteria.example: Recall vs k is monotonic (more k cannot hurt recall); precision vs k is not.
